title: A New Era in Medical Care
article_text: A medical specialist assured the patient that her symptoms were not serious. The patient's profile showed she was in a sensitive mood during that episode. Numerous tests had been done to trace the cause of her tension. The doctor had submitted the results to a specialist who worked in a different zone. The patient felt like a prisoner in her own home because of the unknown illness. The framework of her treatment plan was designed to eliminate all possible causes. The coverage of her health insurance was virtually complete for this era. The cable news reported that a new drug had been developed to crack the disease. The doctor asked for additional input from the patient's family to isolate the problem. The patient wished she had not been so nervous about the whole situation.

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to tell someone something is true to make them feel less worried'?
Which word means 'a sign of illness'?
Which word means 'a person who is kept in a place and cannot leave'?
Which word means 'to separate something from others to study it'?
